---
name: Template or mapping request
description: Request a new template, register, questionnaire, or framework mapping
title: "Add template/mapping: "
labels: [documentation]
---

## Request type

- [ ] Template
- [ ] Register
- [ ] Questionnaire
- [ ] Framework mapping
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Other:

## Use case

Who would use this, and what decision or workflow would it support?

## Suggested fields or sections

List the fields, sections, or controls that should be included.

## Related framework or standard

Mention any relevant framework, standard, or assurance context, such as OWASP LLM Top 10, NIST AI RMF, ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, or internal governance.

## Caveats

What assumptions, limitations, or legal/compliance caveats should be clear?

## Confidentiality check

- [ ] This request does not include secrets, credentials, customer data, private prompts, production logs, or confidential source code.
